---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for masking, auditing, alerts, observability, or docs
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Problem Statement

What use case or pain point is not covered today?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or API you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List workarounds, competing approaches, or why current extension points are not enough.

## Affected Areas

- `privacy-guard-core`
- `privacy-guard-spring-boot-starter`
- `samples/privacy-demo`
- documentation / workflow

## Additional Context

Add examples, sample config, migration concerns, or links to related issues.
